---
title: "Pulakesh Pradhan"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .profile-column}
::: {.profile-card}
![](images/pulakesh.jpg){.profile-img}

# Pulakesh Pradhan
### Geographer | GIS Specialist

::: {.social-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
[Github](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan){.social-btn}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography){.social-btn}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8 .bio-column}
I am a Geographer and Spatial Data Scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing. My work leverages Google Earth Engine and AI to solve complex spatial problems.

[**View full CV →**](cv.qmd){.cv-link}

## 🎓 Education
- **Department of Geography**, Ravenshaw University
- **Focus:** GIS, Remote Sensing, Google Earth Engine

## ✨ Key Highlights
- **Resource Person:** MSBD University & Centurion University
- **Developer:** Creator of `geeadvance`, `deepgee`, and `geeassist`
- **YouTube Creator:** Founder of "Spatial Geography" channel

::: {.home-stats}
[**418+** YouTube Subscribers]{.stat}
[**7,000+** Views]{.stat}
[**3+** Python Packages]{.stat}
:::

## 🚀 Quick Links
[Spectral Curve App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral) | [Phenology App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature) | [Flood Tool](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility)

[Explore Innovations →](software.qmd)
:::

:::

<hr>

## 📌 Latest Insights
::: {#latest-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-3}
